blog.heading: Blog
demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: Watch Takt organize tabs automatically as you browse.
hero.lede: Auto-group tabs by URL rule. Find any tab with Alt+Shift+Space. Prevent duplicates, reclaim memory. All local — no account, no telemetry.
hero.subLede: Built by a security engineer who couldn't stop hoarding tabs.
hero.subCta: No account needed. Free to start.
hero.screenshotAlt: Chrome browser with tabs automatically organized into color-coded groups by Takt
mark.title: One extension. Every color Chrome gives you.
features.rules.title: Group by rule. Walk away.
features.rules.body: Define URL patterns — contains, domain, glob, or full regex. Takt watches every new tab and files it into the right Chrome group with the right color. Manual or automatic. Free tier includes 5 rules with basic matching. Premium unlocks unlimited rules, all match types, title matching, and compound AND/OR conditions.
features.quickSwitch.title: Find any tab. Instantly.
features.quickSwitch.body: Press Alt+Shift+Space anywhere in Chrome. A fuzzy-search overlay appears — type a few letters and jump without touching your mouse. Searches all open tabs by title and URL. Premium extends results to hibernated tabs and your full browsing history.
features.duplicates.title: No duplicates. No surprise.
features.duplicates.body: Open the same URL twice and Takt closes the copy, focuses the original, and shows a quiet toast. Five matching strategies handle query strings, fragments, and trailing slashes. Bypass anytime with Shift+click or the context menu. Premium feature.
features.resources.title: See what your tabs cost.
features.resources.body: Per-tab memory measurement. Per-group health scores from A to F. Network request counts. Staleness tracking for tabs you forgot about. Set memory budgets and Takt discards tabs that exceed them. All measured locally — no external services. Premium feature.
features.hibernation.title: Sleep tabs you don't need.
features.hibernation.body: Takt fully closes idle tabs and saves their state — URL, title, tab group, scroll position. Memory is reclaimed the moment the tab closes. Wake any tab with one click and it returns exactly where you left it. Manual hibernation is always free. Set idle thresholds, memory pressure limits, or a tab ceiling to hibernate automatically — Premium features.
gridCard.sectionLede: The details that make the difference.
gridCard.profiles.title: Profiles for every context
gridCard.profiles.body: Create named rule sets — Work, Personal, Research. Switch in the popup or schedule auto-switching by time of day. Premium.
gridCard.keyboard.title: Keyboard-first
gridCard.keyboard.body: Alt+Shift+G to organize. Alt+Shift+U to ungroup. Alt+Shift+C to collapse. No mouse needed.
gridCard.suggestions.title: Rules you didn't write
gridCard.suggestions.body: Takt watches your unmatched tabs. When a domain cluster appears, it suggests a rule. Accept or dismiss. Free.
gridCard.contextMenu.title: Right-click, done
gridCard.contextMenu.body: Right-click any tab and choose "Create rule from this tab." Takt prefills the URL pattern and group name. Premium.
gridCard.portable.title: Portable settings
gridCard.portable.body: Export rules, settings, and profiles as a single JSON file. Import on another machine. Premium.
gridCard.sessions.title: Save your workspace
gridCard.sessions.body: Snapshot all your tab groups into a named session. Restore later in a new window or replace the current one. Up to 50 sessions. Premium.
gridCard.sync.title: Sync across devices
gridCard.sync.body: Pick a folder watched by your cloud client (Google Drive, Dropbox, iCloud) or connect Google Drive directly for automatic background sync. Premium.
gridCard.groupActions.title: Act on whole groups
gridCard.groupActions.body: Close, bookmark, or move an entire tab group to a new window in one click. Available from the Options page or right-click menu. Premium.
howItWorks.headline: How it works.
howItWorks.step1.title: Install
howItWorks.step1.body: Add Takt from the Chrome Web Store. No account. No setup wizard. Takes five seconds.
howItWorks.step2.title: Write a rule
howItWorks.step2.body: Pick a URL pattern and a group color. Or right-click any tab and let Takt prefill it.
howItWorks.step3.title: Forget about it
howItWorks.step3.body: Enable auto-mode. Takt watches every new tab and groups it. You never touch it again.
pricing.headline: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.free.title: Free
pricing.premium.title: Premium
privacy.headline: Local-first. No accounts. No telemetry.
privacy.body: All data stays in your browser. The only outbound call is license validation for paid features. Nothing else leaves.
cta.headline: Quiet your browser.
cta.footnote: Works with Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
